summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EPIC 7 - Tax Center (Pusat Pajak) feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly with proper RBAC enforcement.
passed_tests: Backend RBAC: Sales gets 403 for /api/tax/summary (no accounting permission)
Backend RBAC: Admin and Manager get 200 for /api/tax/summary
Entity-aware PPN for PKP entity (ent_ksc): is_pkp=true, ppn_rate=11, ppn.applicable=true
All PPN keys present: keluaran, masukan, net_ppn, position, position_label, masukan_by_supplier
PPh structure correct with items and total (PPh total: 1,144,372.11 from payroll)
Entity-aware PPN for NON-PKP entity (ent_kanda): is_pkp=false, ppn_rate=0, ppn.applicable=false
POST /api/tax/pph-records with entity_id='all' returns 400 (validation working)
POST /api/tax/pph-records with specific entity returns 200 with correct amount calculation
Tax summary reflects new PPh manual records immediately
Sales user cannot POST PPh records (403)
Sales user cannot DELETE PPh records (403)
Admin can DELETE PPh records (200)
Tax summary updates correctly after PPh record deletion
PUT /api/settings with tax config works (200)
GET /api/settings/effective respects entity config (NON-PKP entity gets ppn_rate=0)
Frontend: Admin can login and navigate to Tax Center
Frontend: KEUANGAN group expands and Pajak nav item is clickable
Frontend: Tax Center view renders with title 'Pusat Pajak'
Frontend: Entity badge shows entity name and PKP/Non-PKP status
Frontend: Period selector is present and functional
Frontend: All three tabs present (PPN, PPh, Konfigurasi)
Frontend: PPN tab renders with KPI cards (Keluaran, Masukan, Net)
Frontend: PPh tab renders with table showing PPh21 (payroll) and PPh23 (manual)
Frontend: PPh total displays correctly (Rp 1.140.000)
Frontend: Record DPP button is disabled when 'Semua Entitas' selected (correct behavior)
Frontend: Configuration tab renders with PPN rate, mode, e-Faktur checkbox, and scope selector
Frontend: PPN rate field shows 11%
Frontend: e-Faktur checkbox is checked
Frontend RBAC: Sales user cannot see KEUANGAN group in sidebar
Frontend RBAC: Sales user cannot see Pajak nav item
Frontend RBAC: Sales user cannot access Tax Center via direct navigation
